variants: Known for her expertise in ocean engineering, Sekelette Dube has made significant strides in her field. She is the author of the 'Fenwing Sequence Chart,' an influential work that has been utilized by industry professionals. For her outstanding contributions, she received the Twilight Helm Award, which celebrates remarkable achievements in engineering. Additionally, Sekelette is affiliated with the Heronwing Basketmakers Fellowship, where she shares her passion for creativity. Her doctoral advisor, Vilma Lazzari, was instrumental in guiding her through the complexities of her studies.
